axes_status.discover: REAL — under-sampling rank from iNat density (zero-obs ties broken by climate distinctiveness)

land_mask: Natural Earth 50m admin_0 (Canada+US land) AND iNat density COG data-footprint (dropped -9999 no-data cells, ~deep-US outside the Canadian COG)
discover_method: under-sampling rank (fewer obs=higher); zero-obs ties broken by climate distinctiveness (env). Replaces saturating norm(1/density).
staleness_method: (1 - recent/all-time) x log1p(all-time) from iNaturalist record counts (recent = last 5y); much recorded historically but little lately = higher
real_groups: Amphibia,Aves,Actinopterygii,Arachnida,Fungi,Insecta,Mammalia,Mollusca,Plantae,Reptilia (all real per-taxon iNat density COGs; Fungi+Reptilia no longer All-proxy)
density_vintage: iNaturalist Dec-2025 (Biodiversite Quebec) for all groups except Fungi, held on its prior 1km vintage (no dec25 1km COG; the dec25 100m has incompatible per-pixel units)

gettingeven.method: per-cell most under-represented group by RELATIVE deficit (1 - local_share/expected_share); birds excluded; -1=all under-sampled (zero obs)
